judge_result.short_rationale: All required eye-exposure actions are present in the correct order: flush with running water while holding lids open, remove contact lenses, continue for at least 15 minutes or until told to stop, and seek immediate medical help. The added do-not-stop warning is source-grounded and field-usable.
